4.title: Take your pet home
4.descPart2: of a paw’s touch. Happiness and a new rhythm.

ourNumbers.paragraph1: Adoptly - a platform where everyone can find their loyal friend.
ourNumbers.paragraph2: Here you can see photos, read stories, feel the connection and take an important step.
ourNumbers.paragraph3: We combined love for pets and modern technologies to make adoption closer and easier. Our platform is created to connect hearts – yours and theirs.
ourNumbers.paragraph4: Adoptly works with shelters and volunteers across the country to help animals find caring owners. Every “match” here is a chance for a new life.

stories.name: Jack
description: Jack came to the shelter as a puppy – tender and kind, but a little shy. He always waited by the window, looking out as if searching for his person.

A 30-year-old guy named Andriy saw his photo. He didn’t plan to get a dog, but there was something special in Jack’s eyes – it was a match. The next day Andriy came to the shelter, and when Jack immediately jumped into his arms – it was clear.
Now Jack has his own home, a favorite blanket, and morning cuddles. Andriy says it’s the best decision of his life.

stories.name: Roxy
description: Roxy used to have a home but ended up in the shelter after her previous owners moved. At first, she didn’t trust anyone and hid in a small house.

A family with two kids — Marko and Sofiika — came to the shelter. They wanted a gentle cat who would befriend the children. Marko quietly slid a bowl of food toward Roxy, and she carefully came out to rub against his hand.
Now Roxy sleeps at the children’s feet, chases toys, and loves watching birds from the window. The family’s mother says their home feels warmer and happier with her around.

stories.name: Richie
description: Richie ended up in the shelter after being abandoned by his former owners. He was energetic but very obedient and grateful for any attention.

One day, a family visited the shelter with a 5-year-old boy named Artem. The boy was a little afraid of dogs, but Richie just sat next to him and gently placed his head on Artem’s knees. The fear disappeared in minutes.
Now Artem and Richie are inseparable: they play in the yard, walk to school together (Richie waits at the gate), and even fall asleep together on the couch after evening cartoons.

stories.name: Chara
description: Chara was found on the street in winter – skinny, frozen, with an injured paw. The shelter took care of her, but she still hid from people.

Iryna, who had recently moved into a new apartment, felt she lacked warmth. She decided to give a chance to the pet that was least likely to be chosen. When she first held Chara, the cat trembled, but at home she started purring quietly.
Today Chara sleeps on a pillow next to Iryna, and their apartment is filled with the smell of freshly brewed tea and true coziness.

readyToAdopt.title: Ready to meet your new friend?
readyToAdopt.description: Choose filters – cat or dog, age, size and other options – and start searching for your companion right now.
